imageUri.description: URI for the image representing the feature.

localisedDescription.description: Localized display description for the feature.

localisedName.description: Localized display name for the feature.

prerequisites.description: List of keys of the features required to enable the feature.

state.description: The state of the feature. When updating the state of a feature, only ENABLED and DISABLED are supported. Responses can contain all values

toggleLocked.description: Whether the state of the feature can be updated.
